probes.name: add_channel_to_topic
probes.prompt: Add this channel to tracked channels in the topic of ai agents: https://www.youtube.com/@AIExplained
probes.criteria:
The agent is a YouTube research manager. A good response confirms the channel was added to tracked channels under the 'ai agents' topic, mentions the channel name, and optionally lists any other channels already in that topic.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by real message #10: 'Add this to tracked channels in the topic of the ai agents'

probes.name: fetch_video_url
probes.prompt: Fetch me the url for "Andrew Huberman sleep protocol" video
probes.criteria:
The agent manages YouTube video lookup. A good response returns a clickable YouTube URL matching the requested video title, includes the video title in the response, and does not hallucinate links — if not found, says so clearly.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.

probes.name: analyze_latest_videos
probes.prompt: Can you check what's new on my tracked channels in the last 2 days and give me a quick summary of the most interesting videos?
probes.criteria:
The agent manages YouTube research including video analysis via topic_analyzer.py. A good response fetches recent videos from tracked channels (within ~2 days), presents clickable URLs for each, and provides brief summaries highlighting why each is interesting or relevant to the user's topics.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.

probes.name: remove_topic_preference
probes.prompt: Yes please remove the topic 'crypto trading' from my tracked list, I'm not interested in that anymore. Also clean up any duplicate channels under the 'ai agents' topic while you're at it.
probes.criteria:
The agent manages YouTube topics, channels, and preferences. A good response (1) confirms removal of the 'crypto trading' topic and its associated channels, (2) identifies and removes duplicate channels under 'ai agents', and (3) shows the cleaned-up result. Must handle both operations in one response.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by real message #30: 'Yes please clean up duplicates' and message #10: 'Add this to tracked channels in the topic of the ai agents'
